title: Perturbations by nilpotent operators on Hilbert space
author_string: Brown, Arlen, Pearcy, Carl, Salinas, Norberto
journal: Proceedings of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
If 

  
    T
    T
  

 is any noncompact, bounded, linear operator on a separable Hilbert space 

  
    H
    H
  

, then there exists a nilpotent (bounded, linear) operator 

  
    N
    N
  

 on 

  
    H
    H
  

 such that 

  
    
      N
      +
      T
    
    N + T
  

 is invertible.
